title: Constellations UI
description: Unique GUI that offers a Magical Steampunk Vibe crossed with Stargazing
body:
Constellations UI adds a unique magic steampunk-ish & stargazing vibe.

# Implemented Screens:
Right now the Resourcepack is still in early beta and only overhauls a few screens.
Currently the Resourcepack implements two tiers of Screens:

- Tier 1: Finished Screens
- Tier 2: Placeholder Screens that are finished and will be reworked later

Tier 1 Screens are finished and only need some polishing like the text labels. Needing to be accounted for
Tier 2 Screens dont have unique features to their screens and are only adjusted copies of a template screen.

Currently the implemented Screens are:
- Anvil - Tier 2
- Brewing Stand - Tier 2
- Crafting Table - Tier 2
- Enchanting Table - Tier 2
- Furnace - Tier 2
- Chests - Tier 2
- Inventory - Tier 1
- Shulker Chest - Tier 2
